subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'llah! Hearken with thy soul's ear unto the Voice of the Wronged One. In the earliest days, the faces of the followers of all religions, unveiled and without concealment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله ندای مظلوم را بگوش جان بشنو در اول ایام امام وجوه اهل ادیان من غیر ستر و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @suffering and imprisonment, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @spiritual transformation
